touches.subject: {shopName} — {productCount} products, {reelCount} reels?

touches.message: Did the Loom land? Made a {topProduct} reel for {shopName} — happy to make one more for your top seller. 30s each, hosting + chat in the same ৳3500.

touches.subject: You'd save ৳{roiSavings}/mo
touches.body: Quick math for {shopName}: at your reel volume you'd save ৳{roiSavings}/mo vs paying an agency ৳500/reel — plus you drop ExonHost, CapCut, ChatGPT into one ৳3500 bill. ROI screenshot attached.

touches.message: Social proof: an Aarong seller {name} made 30 reels last week on Hostamar — all with bKash checkout links baked in. Want the same setup for {shopName}?

touches.subject: Closing the file for {shopName}
touches.body: Closing your file for now, {name} — but I'll keep a hosting slot open for {shopName} for a week. If the ৳8000+/mo across 5 tools ever gets tiring, one ৳3500 Hostamar bill replaces all of them. Reply and I'll reactivate.
